TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lalood i Madawdaw == Lalood no Madawdaw ('Amis: Lalood no Madawdaw), nai 1911 miheca malengatay i Posong no Taywan a kowan a miliyangay to tayring no Dipong ko 'Amis finacadan a demak, o satata'akay demak piliyang to Dipong a demak. Sacisowal sa ko Dipong o "Folalacay" a demak saan, nika no 'Amis finacadan a sowal "Lalood no Madawdaw" (Madawdaw a demak) han. Likisi Nano picowat no Dipong to sawali no Taywan i, paretatenga sa ko Dipong o so'emetay, lahodayay pa'ekelen ko 'Amis a tamdaw nasa, tinako o pisalalan, patireng to lalan no kisya, nao matahidangay ko Folalacay (Madawdaw) a 'Amis tamdaw tayra a matayal, saka mapakaroray ko 'Amis tamdaw to matayal a ira ko piliyang a demak. Meici 44 (1911) miheca 3 folad, mihapiw ko Dipong pakapayso ko pi'aca to nipakaenan a fafofafoy…, papipasadak to sakalalood no 'Amis a tamdaw, sapifalicaw to no to'asan pi'adop no 'Amis a pinangan, patongal to pilatado no omahan a kinaira. Toya mihecaan 4 folad, o Congtofo papipasadaken nai kasaniyaro' to sakalalood a todong, mitelek nai 6 folad miteka paterep to nai 'ayaway padamso t okasaniyaro' to kakitaan a lifon sato. Toya 5 folad, itiraay Folalacay kasaniyaro' a kakitaan miala to yaa foladan a padamso, pinokayan to nangra langiwngiw to nipatangican pasadak to sakalalood, karorayan a matayal, masa'opo masasowal to sapilaplap to Dipong a tamdaw; 7 folad 25 romi'ad miliyaw haca ko Dipong pakoniyah miocor to kasaniyaro' a kakitaan misalalan, maliyang ko nicokeray kakitaan no Tolik, saka pakemo han to ningra ko fongoh no Tayling, malengat ko sapipatayan no kasaniyaro' a kakitaan to tailing no Dipong. Mafana' ko niyaro'ay no Madawdaw tonini a ratoh i, o pikerid no kakitaan a macowat, halo Tolik, Paongong a niyaro' makomod to tayra i Folalacay, pasilaloma'an no kaitiraan no Dipong a miri'ang, maala ko pinapina a toki, o pilefek no 'Amis, alaen ko dafong no Dipong a miliyas, itira to i Kinapoka 'alo mitena'. Sakalamkam sato ko Dipong mitahidang to nai Taypi, Yilan, Tayciw ato Taynan a tailing ira ko pangkiw no foladan hato caay kasafa misorar ko 'Amis a tamdaw, ikor sato pakayni toya Falangaw niyaro' a kakitaan ci Kolas Mahengheng ko milalangay papipasadak to sakalalood itiya to pahater ko demak, pakayni tonini a demakan 3 ko romi'adan, o sakacaaw ka padoedo no demak, caay sato pikadkad tonini demak, nika ira aca ko pico'ay, tinako corahen ko niyaro' no Madawdaw ato loma' no Tolik niyaro', maala ko kofafofafoy pinapakaenan. O foraw no finawlan to demak no Dipong I 1911 miheca 5 folad, Cenkuangao (aniniay Folalacay niyaro') kakitaan no kasaniyaro' mililam to lifon no foladan itiya, nika maliyang a macangal no saka 2 folad caay ka citodong to lifon ko kakitaan. Katimolay a kasakakitaan pinokayan mahicera i Pisirian niyaro' loma' no kakitaan a masasowal to kacangalan a malaplap, mailil a maainiini to sasowalen i kaherekan no pipanay i masa'opo milaplap to Dipong midipot to finawlan, talacowa iraira ko kalacecayan no salowadan nika awaay ko masarocoday no lalowadan a demak. Saka 6 foladan itiya, kasanniyaro' ala micolocolo' sa to panay patayra i lotok misimed todong lalowadan no piliyang to Dipong. Toya miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad, o nai Tolikay a tayring o Dipong a tamdaw misolapay ci Fukuma Hikoshirō misa'opo to kakitaan no kasaniyaro' maketer to pakayniay misararaay ko tayal misalalan. Oya sato, micokeray kakitaan no Tolik niyaro' ci Laolod i, marketer miliyang to sowal no tayring ci Fukuma Hikoshirō saka pakemo han ko fongoh. Nanoya o kakitaan no Tolik ci Asan ato romaroma a kakitaan kidkid han to nangra pasadak nai laloma' no Tayring a mipatay, pakayni tonini a demakan macowat to ko sapiliyang no 'Amis to Dipong "Lalood i Madawdaw" han ko nademak.
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw (ʡamis: ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw), nai **** miħəʦa maɾəŋataj i po~uso~uŋ no~u tajwan a ko~uwan a miɾijaŋaj to~u tajriŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u satataʡakaj ɬ~ɮəmak piɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u "fo~uɾaɾaʦaj" a ɬ~ɮəmak saan, nika no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak) ħan. ɾikisi nano~u piʦo~uwat no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sawaɾi no~u tajwan i, parətatəŋa sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u so~uʡəmətaj, ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj paʡəkəɾən ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw nasa, tinako~u o~u pisaɾaɾan, patirəŋ to~u ɾaɾan no~u kisja, nao~u mataħiɬ~ɮaŋaj ko~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw) a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw tajra a matajaɾ, saka mapakaro~uraj ko~u ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw to~u matajaɾ a ira ko~u piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. məiʦi ** (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ pakapajso~u ko~u piʡaʦa to~u nipakaənan a fafo~ufafo~uj*, papipasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, sapifaɾiʦaw to~u no~u to~uʡasan piʡaɬ~ɮo~up no~u ʡamis a pinaŋan, pato~uŋaɾ to~u piɾataɬ~ɮo~u no~u o~umaħan a kinaira. to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦo~uŋto~ufo~u papipasaɬ~ɮakən nai kasanijaro~uʡ to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, mitəɾək nai * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitəka patərəp to~u nai ʡajawaj paɬ~ɮamso~u t o~ukasanijaro~uʡ to~u kakitaan a ɾifo~un sato~u. to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, itiraaj fo~uɾaɾaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan miaɾa to~u jaa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan a paɬ~ɮamso~u, pino~ukajan to~u naŋra ɾaŋiwŋiw to~u nipataŋiʦan pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, karo~urajan a matajaɾ, masaʡo~upo~u masaso~uwaɾ to~u sapiɾapɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw; * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾijaw ħaʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ pako~unijaħ mio~uʦo~ur to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan misaɾaɾan, maɾijaŋ ko~u niʦo~ukəraj kakitaan no~u to~uɾik, saka pakəmo~u ħan to~u niŋra ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ no~u tajɾiŋ, maɾəŋat ko~u sapipatajan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan to~u taiɾiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. mafanaʡ ko~u nijaro~uʡaj no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~unini a rato~uħ i, o~u pikəriɬ~ɮ no~u kakitaan a maʦo~uwat, ħaɾo~u to~uɾik, pao~uŋo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ mako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajra i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj, pasiɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kaitiraan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miriʡaŋ, maaɾa ko~u pinapina a to~uki, o~u piɾəfək no~u ʡamis, aɾaən ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾijas, itira to~u i kinapo~uka ʡaɾo~u mitənaʡ. sakaɾamkam sato~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai tajpi, jiɾan, tajʦiw ato~u tajnan a taiɾiŋ ira ko~u paŋkiw no~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ħato~u ʦaaj kasafa miso~urar ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, iko~ur sato~u pakajni to~uja faɾaŋaw nijaro~uʡ a kakitaan ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ ko~u miɾaɾaŋaj papipasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija to~u paħatər ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan * ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, o~u sakaʦaaw ka paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj sato~u pikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ to~unini ɬ~ɮəmak, nika ira aʦa ko~u piʦo~uʡaj, tinako~u ʦo~uraħən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u to~uɾik nijaro~uʡ, maaɾa ko~u ko~ufafo~ufafo~uj pinapakaənan. o~u fo~uraw no~u finawɾan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦənko~u~uaŋao~u (aniniaj fo~uɾaɾaʦaj nijaro~uʡ) kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ miɾiɾam to~u ɾifo~un no~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan itija, nika maɾijaŋ a maʦaŋaɾ no~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾifo~un ko~u kakitaan. katimo~uɾaj a kasakakitaan pino~ukajan maħiʦəra i pisirian nijaro~uʡ ɾo~umaʡ no~u kakitaan a masaso~uwaɾ to~u kaʦaŋaɾan a maɾapɾap, maiɾiɾ a maainiini to~u saso~uwaɾən i kaħərəkan no~u pipanaj i masaʡo~upo~u miɾapɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan, taɾaʦo~uwa iraira ko~u kaɾaʦəʦajan no~u saɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan nika awaaj ko~u masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan itija, kasannijaro~uʡ aɾa miʦo~uɾo~uʦo~uɾo~uʡ sa to~u panaj patajra i ɾo~uto~uk misiməɬ~ɮ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u piɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nai to~uɾikaj a tajriŋ o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw miso~uɾapaj ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħiko~usħir* misaʡo~upo~u to~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ makətər to~u pakajniaj misararaaj ko~u tajaɾ misaɾaɾan. o~uja sato~u, miʦo~ukəraj kakitaan no~u to~uɾik nijaro~uʡ ʦi ɾao~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ i, markətər miɾijaŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajriŋ ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħiko~usħir* saka pakəmo~u ħan ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ. nano~uja o~u kakitaan no~u to~uɾik ʦi asan ato~u ro~umaro~uma a kakitaan kiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮ ħan to~u naŋra pasaɬ~ɮak nai ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajriŋ a mipataj, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u sapiɾijaŋ no~u ʡamis to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" ħan ko~u naɬ~ɮəmak.
S.FORM: == Lalood i Madawdaw == Lalood no Madawdaw ('Amis: Lalood no Madawdaw), nai 1911 miheca malengatay i Posong no Taywan a kowan a miliyangay to tayring no Dipong ko 'Amis finacadan a demak, o satata'akay demak piliyang to Dipong a demak. Sacisowal sa ko Dipong o "Folalacay" a demak saan, nika no 'Amis finacadan a sowal "Lalood no Madawdaw" (Madawdaw a demak) han. Likisi Nano picowat no Dipong to sawali no Taywan i, paretatenga sa ko Dipong o so'emetay, lahodayay pa'ekelen ko 'Amis a tamdaw nasa, tinako o pisalalan, patireng to lalan no kisya, nao matahidangay ko Folalacay (Madawdaw) a 'Amis tamdaw tayra a matayal, saka mapakaroray ko 'Amis tamdaw to matayal a ira ko piliyang a demak. Meici 44 (1911) miheca 3 folad, mihapiw ko Dipong pakapayso ko pi'aca to nipakaenan a fafofafoy…, papipasadak to sakalalood no 'Amis a tamdaw, sapifalicaw to no to'asan pi'adop no 'Amis a pinangan, patongal to pilatado no omahan a kinaira. Toya mihecaan 4 folad, o Congtofo papipasadaken nai kasaniyaro' to sakalalood a todong, mitelek nai 6 folad miteka paterep to nai 'ayaway padamso t okasaniyaro' to kakitaan a lifon sato. Toya 5 folad, itiraay Folalacay kasaniyaro' a kakitaan miala to yaa foladan a padamso, pinokayan to nangra langiwngiw to nipatangican pasadak to sakalalood, karorayan a matayal, masa'opo masasowal to sapilaplap to Dipong a tamdaw; 7 folad 25 romi'ad miliyaw haca ko Dipong pakoniyah miocor to kasaniyaro' a kakitaan misalalan, maliyang ko nicokeray kakitaan no Tolik, saka pakemo han to ningra ko fongoh no Tayling, malengat ko sapipatayan no kasaniyaro' a kakitaan to tailing no Dipong. Mafana' ko niyaro'ay no Madawdaw tonini a ratoh i, o pikerid no kakitaan a macowat, halo Tolik, Paongong a niyaro' makomod to tayra i Folalacay, pasilaloma'an no kaitiraan no Dipong a miri'ang, maala ko pinapina a toki, o pilefek no 'Amis, alaen ko dafong no Dipong a miliyas, itira to i Kinapoka 'alo mitena'. Sakalamkam sato ko Dipong mitahidang to nai Taypi, Yilan, Tayciw ato Taynan a tailing ira ko pangkiw no foladan hato caay kasafa misorar ko 'Amis a tamdaw, ikor sato pakayni toya Falangaw niyaro' a kakitaan ci Kolas Mahengheng ko milalangay papipasadak to sakalalood itiya to pahater ko demak, pakayni tonini a demakan 3 ko romi'adan, o sakacaaw ka padoedo no demak, caay sato pikadkad tonini demak, nika ira aca ko pico'ay, tinako corahen ko niyaro' no Madawdaw ato loma' no Tolik niyaro', maala ko kofafofafoy pinapakaenan. O foraw no finawlan to demak no Dipong I 1911 miheca 5 folad, Cenkuangao (aniniay Folalacay niyaro') kakitaan no kasaniyaro' mililam to lifon no foladan itiya, nika maliyang a macangal no saka 2 folad caay ka citodong to lifon ko kakitaan. Katimolay a kasakakitaan pinokayan mahicera i Pisirian niyaro' loma' no kakitaan a masasowal to kacangalan a malaplap, mailil a maainiini to sasowalen i kaherekan no pipanay i masa'opo milaplap to Dipong midipot to finawlan, talacowa iraira ko kalacecayan no salowadan nika awaay ko masarocoday no lalowadan a demak. Saka 6 foladan itiya, kasanniyaro' ala micolocolo' sa to panay patayra i lotok misimed todong lalowadan no piliyang to Dipong. Toya miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad, o nai Tolikay a tayring o Dipong a tamdaw misolapay ci Fukuma Hikoshirō misa'opo to kakitaan no kasaniyaro' maketer to pakayniay misararaay ko tayal misalalan. Oya sato, micokeray kakitaan no Tolik niyaro' ci Laolod i, marketer miliyang to sowal no tayring ci Fukuma Hikoshirō saka pakemo han ko fongoh. Nanoya o kakitaan no Tolik ci Asan ato romaroma a kakitaan kidkid han to nangra pasadak nai laloma' no Tayring a mipatay, pakayni tonini a demakan macowat to ko sapiliyang no 'Amis to Dipong "Lalood i Madawdaw" han ko nademak.
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw (ʡamis: ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw), nai **** miħəʦa maɾəŋataj i po~uso~uŋ no~u tajwan a ko~uwan a miɾijaŋaj to~u tajriŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u satataʡakaj ɬ~ɮəmak piɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. saʦiso~uwaɾ sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u "fo~uɾaɾaʦaj" a ɬ~ɮəmak saan, nika no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a so~uwaɾ "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw a ɬ~ɮəmak) ħan. ɾikisi nano~u piʦo~uwat no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sawaɾi no~u tajwan i, parətatəŋa sa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ o~u so~uʡəmətaj, ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj paʡəkəɾən ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw nasa, tinako~u o~u pisaɾaɾan, patirəŋ to~u ɾaɾan no~u kisja, nao~u mataħiɬ~ɮaŋaj ko~u fo~uɾaɾaʦaj (maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw) a ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw tajra a matajaɾ, saka mapakaro~uraj ko~u ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw to~u matajaɾ a ira ko~u piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. məiʦi ** (****) miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ pakapajso~u ko~u piʡaʦa to~u nipakaənan a fafo~ufafo~uj*, papipasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, sapifaɾiʦaw to~u no~u to~uʡasan piʡaɬ~ɮo~up no~u ʡamis a pinaŋan, pato~uŋaɾ to~u piɾataɬ~ɮo~u no~u o~umaħan a kinaira. to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʦo~uŋto~ufo~u papipasaɬ~ɮakən nai kasanijaro~uʡ to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, mitəɾək nai * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitəka patərəp to~u nai ʡajawaj paɬ~ɮamso~u t o~ukasanijaro~uʡ to~u kakitaan a ɾifo~un sato~u. to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, itiraaj fo~uɾaɾaʦaj kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan miaɾa to~u jaa fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan a paɬ~ɮamso~u, pino~ukajan to~u naŋra ɾaŋiwŋiw to~u nipataŋiʦan pasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, karo~urajan a matajaɾ, masaʡo~upo~u masaso~uwaɾ to~u sapiɾapɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw; * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾijaw ħaʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ pako~unijaħ mio~uʦo~ur to~u kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan misaɾaɾan, maɾijaŋ ko~u niʦo~ukəraj kakitaan no~u to~uɾik, saka pakəmo~u ħan to~u niŋra ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ no~u tajɾiŋ, maɾəŋat ko~u sapipatajan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ a kakitaan to~u taiɾiŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. mafanaʡ ko~u nijaro~uʡaj no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw to~unini a rato~uħ i, o~u pikəriɬ~ɮ no~u kakitaan a maʦo~uwat, ħaɾo~u to~uɾik, pao~uŋo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ mako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tajra i fo~uɾaɾaʦaj, pasiɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kaitiraan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miriʡaŋ, maaɾa ko~u pinapina a to~uki, o~u piɾəfək no~u ʡamis, aɾaən ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miɾijas, itira to~u i kinapo~uka ʡaɾo~u mitənaʡ. sakaɾamkam sato~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai tajpi, jiɾan, tajʦiw ato~u tajnan a taiɾiŋ ira ko~u paŋkiw no~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan ħato~u ʦaaj kasafa miso~urar ko~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, iko~ur sato~u pakajni to~uja faɾaŋaw nijaro~uʡ a kakitaan ʦi ko~uɾas maħəŋħəŋ ko~u miɾaɾaŋaj papipasaɬ~ɮak to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija to~u paħatər ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan * ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, o~u sakaʦaaw ka paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj sato~u pikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮ to~unini ɬ~ɮəmak, nika ira aʦa ko~u piʦo~uʡaj, tinako~u ʦo~uraħən ko~u nijaro~uʡ no~u maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u to~uɾik nijaro~uʡ, maaɾa ko~u ko~ufafo~ufafo~uj pinapakaənan. o~u fo~uraw no~u finawɾan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ʦənko~u~uaŋao~u (aniniaj fo~uɾaɾaʦaj nijaro~uʡ) kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ miɾiɾam to~u ɾifo~un no~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan itija, nika maɾijaŋ a maʦaŋaɾ no~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u ɾifo~un ko~u kakitaan. katimo~uɾaj a kasakakitaan pino~ukajan maħiʦəra i pisirian nijaro~uʡ ɾo~umaʡ no~u kakitaan a masaso~uwaɾ to~u kaʦaŋaɾan a maɾapɾap, maiɾiɾ a maainiini to~u saso~uwaɾən i kaħərəkan no~u pipanaj i masaʡo~upo~u miɾapɾap to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u finawɾan, taɾaʦo~uwa iraira ko~u kaɾaʦəʦajan no~u saɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan nika awaaj ko~u masaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮəmak. saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮan itija, kasannijaro~uʡ aɾa miʦo~uɾo~uʦo~uɾo~uʡ sa to~u panaj patajra i ɾo~uto~uk misiməɬ~ɮ to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u piɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nai to~uɾikaj a tajriŋ o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw miso~uɾapaj ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħiko~usħir* misaʡo~upo~u to~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ makətər to~u pakajniaj misararaaj ko~u tajaɾ misaɾaɾan. o~uja sato~u, miʦo~ukəraj kakitaan no~u to~uɾik nijaro~uʡ ʦi ɾao~uɾo~uɬ~ɮ i, markətər miɾijaŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajriŋ ʦi fo~u~uko~u~uma ħiko~usħir* saka pakəmo~u ħan ko~u fo~uŋo~uħ. nano~uja o~u kakitaan no~u to~uɾik ʦi asan ato~u ro~umaro~uma a kakitaan kiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮ ħan to~u naŋra pasaɬ~ɮak nai ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tajriŋ a mipataj, pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmakan maʦo~uwat to~u ko~u sapiɾijaŋ no~u ʡamis to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ "ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw" ħan ko~u naɬ~ɮəmak.
